hero_metrics.subtext: Planning baseline throughput from the reference case.

hero_metrics.label: Reference Recovery
hero_metrics.subtext: Average metallurgical recovery in the reference case.

hero_metrics.label: Reference Unit Opex
hero_metrics.subtext: Average unit operating cost in the reference case.

hero_metrics.label: Probability of Loss
hero_metrics.subtext: Advanced downside signal from the stochastic module.

benchmark.label: Incremental NPV
benchmark.reconciliation_note: Workbook deterministic VAN for the incremental expansion flow. Direct comparison is valid, but the residual gap remains material.

benchmark.label: Incremental IRR
benchmark.reconciliation_note: Workbook deterministic IRR for the incremental expansion flow. Direct comparison is valid, but the residual gap remains material.

benchmark.label: Expected NPV
benchmark.reconciliation_note: Workbook Monte Carlo expected NPV for the incremental expansion model. Comparison blocked by: stochastic_design_mismatch, basis_mismatch.

benchmark.label: VaR 5%
benchmark.reconciliation_note: Workbook 5th percentile NPV for the incremental expansion model. Comparison blocked by: stochastic_design_mismatch, basis_mismatch.

benchmark.label: CVaR 5%
benchmark.reconciliation_note: Workbook conditional tail mean beyond the 5th percentile for the incremental expansion model. Comparison blocked by: stochastic_design_mismatch, basis_mismatch.

insights.label: Planning Baseline
insights.title: The reference case already reads like a mining planning dashboard.
insights.body: The base case averages 163.51 Mt of processed material per year, 84.2% recovery, and 21.30 USD/t of unit opex. That combination is easier to discuss in planning, management control, and business analysis contexts than valuation alone.

insights.label: Business Signal
insights.title: Scenario spread connects operations, market exposure, and margin pressure.
insights.body: The strongest deterministic case is Bull Market while Investment Committee Downside is the weakest. The base-case EBITDA margin proxy is 12.2%, which makes price, throughput, recovery, and unit cost natural executive dashboard drivers.

insights.label: Advanced Layer
insights.title: Valuation and tail risk remain useful, but secondary.
insights.body: Loss probability is 33.9%, 5% VaR is -3.68B USD, and the committee-downside case reaches -7.21B USD. Those outputs strengthen the portfolio, but they now sit behind the planning and KPI story instead of replacing it.
